"[8] LA PAZ WAS INQ IF WE WANT THEM TO HOLD THE PRTY SINCE HE HIT THE DONKEY AND LEFT, BUT SINCE WE DONT HAVE ANYONE ON DUTY HE IS GOING TO RELEASE THE DRIVER AND CHECK THE RDWY TO SEE IF ANYTHING IS 1125 "
"[7] PER LA PAZ UNK IF THE DONKEY IS IN THE RDWY OR THE GRILL IS IN THE RDWY "
"[5] DOES NOT KNOW IF ANIMAL IS IN THE RDWY "
"[1] MOD TO STRONG WINDS / TA'S FOR HP VEHS ONLY"
